agents/agent_coo.mission: Plan, decompose, and orchestrate multi-step research and production tasks using claude-sonnet.

agents/agent_researcher.mission: Gather, structure, and synthesize information relevant to a given task objective.

agents/agent_worker.mission: Execute and produce deliverables — documents, code, or artifacts — to the highest specification.

agents/agent_grader.mission: Assess output quality, compliance, and correctness. Assign final grading score.
